Set up new profile

Boxes marked (*) are obligatory.
Account
Please set your individual account name (login) and password. Important: Please save your login and password.


Login *
(Cannot be an email address, may only contain letters and numbers)
Password
(at least 8 characters)
Repeat password
Register as
Register as *
Company / Creative Agency / Research
Businesses, digital/design agencies, start-ups, institutions and research facilities worldwide can submit products, services, environments and concepts for the Award categories "Product" and "Concept". The number of submissions is unlimited.
Download Participant Information
Graduate / Student
The "New Talent" Award category is open to bachelor's and master's projects by students and graduates worldwide. Individual submissions are limited to one project per participant.
Download Participant Information
University
Universities may submit an unlimited number of their students' projects for the "New Talent" Award category. The category is open to bachelor's and master's projects in the fields of experience / interaction design, industrial / product design and service design worldwide.
Download Participant Information

Award Dates and Deadlines
UX Design Awards – Autumn 2026
Submission Period

1 March – 15 May 2026

You can already set up a profile in the Participant Portal. Submissions can be set up from March 1st!

First Award Level: Nomination

21 May – 31 May 2026

Review of all submissions by the Jury, admission of a limited number of entries to compete for the Award titles.

Notification of Nominees

2 June 2026

Public Nominee Announcement

7 July 2026

Announcement of the Nominees on the Awards website. Start of PR campaign for all nominated projects.

Public Choice Award Voting

7 July – 21 August 2026

Worldwide vote for the Public Choice Award among all nominated projects on the Awards website.

Second Award Level: Judging

Beginning of July 2026

Jury Session: Granting of the Gold Awards, UX Design Awards, and Special Mentions by the Jury in the categories Product, Concept and New Talent.

Winner Announcement

2 September 2026

Announcement of the Winners: UX Design Award | Gold, UX Design Award and Special Mention in the categories Product, Concept and New Talent, as well as the Public Choice Award Winner.

All award winners are highlighted in the online exhibition.

PR Campaign: Award Winners

September 2026 – February 2027

Promotion of Award Winners via social media and virtual events.

Upcoming

UX Design Awards – Autumn 2027

Call for Participation:
1 September – 15 November 2026

Our Awards Jury Knows Great UX Design
Jury Members

The jury is the core of the UX Design Awards. The independent experts’ many years of experience guarantee the highest quality of the competition.

The International Design Center Berlin appoints jury members according to their experience, knowledge, and expertise in different areas of design and user experience.

The judges’ diverse backgrounds ensure a balanced evaluation of all submissions throughout our rigorous judging process.

Judging Criteria

关于.text:
search

++ Call for Entries: Open until 15 May! ++ Register Here ++ Discover the Jury

 

++ Call for Entries: Open until 15 May! ++ Register Here ++ Discover the Jury

++ Call for Entries: Open until 15 May! ++ Register Here ++ Discover the Jury

 

++ Call for Entries: Open until 15 May! ++ Register Here ++ Discover the Jury

The Global Mark for Outstanding Experiences
Our Mission

The UX Design Awards foster the impact user experience has on shaping our lives, products and services. Originating in 2008 as a show for good usability, we established the Awards in 2015.

The UX Design Awards present great experiences and accomplished solutions – across all fields and industries worldwide – twice per year.

How to Enter

Design is about improving people's lives.

UX design is essential for understanding people's needs and creating effective solutions across all areas of business.

By delivering products that work and people love, UX design plays a key role in improving customer satisfaction, supporting business goals, and driving positive change.

That’s why we’re dedicated to recognizing exceptional work in UX design and celebrating the talented people behind it.

Our thorough approach to judging – and the focus on a key design field – make the UX Design Awards stand out among other design competitions worldwide.

See Winners

We promote accomplished design and celebrate the people behind it.

At the International Design Center Berlin (IDZ), we focus on sustainability and people experience – two core issues of our time. In doing so, we build on the expertise of our members in design and business, and our extensive partner network in politics and society.

The IDZ benefits from over 50 years of experience and stands for good design.

As an independent design association, we represent the highest professional expertise, with leaders and specialists working in diverse industries and design fields.

The UX Design Awards are central to our mission: to promote accomplished design and to recognize the people involved.

About IDZ

Industry Testimonials
“I fell in love with the global scope of the awards and I can really appreciate the opportunity to be exposed to such a diverse range of ideas from the best design minds on the planet.“

Amber Lundy, Director of Product Design, Ford Electric Vehicles

“What is unique about the UX Design Awards is that it's organized by a non-profit design organization: a membership network for designers by designers. Because of this focus it has a totally different expert level.“

Pia Betton, Design and Site Lead, Nutanix

“In a connected world, user experiences are the real game changers for consumer preferences and business success. Evaluating these is a delicate process. IDZ and the awards team of judges are doing a great job promoting best practice in UX design.“

Klaus Schröder, Founder & Business Innovation Director, User-Planet
